title: HitRangeActivity
description:
A mod featuring visual enhancements and combat utilities (particles, PotFix, and sounds).
A mod based on BetterHitReg, which has been modified for legitimate use. Base version 1.21.11
body:
## ═════════════════════════ **Overview** ════════════════════════

_**A utility mod for PvP designed to make combat feel smooth and keep your screen from becoming a chaotic mess of particles. I made it because I got tired of potions dropping slowly when switching slots quickly and not knowing if the server was stealing my hits (ghost hits).**_

This mod is strictly Client-Side and is designed to synchronize the visual hit registration. It does not bypass server-side reach limits.

## Features:

Client-side synchronization: Improves the way the client perceives hit detection.

Customizable visual hitbox elements: Adjusts how hitboxes and hit detection are displayed (visual only).

Optimized performance: Lightweight and designed to run smoothly on both Forge and Fabric.
## ════════════════════════ **Contents** ═════════════════════════
- Combat Engine: _Main toggle to enable visual and audio enhancements. This feature is designed to compensate for visual hit registration delay and synchronize combat sounds, providing a more responsive and accurate feedback loop for the player._
 
- Clean Visuals: _You can hide armor, damage animations, and particles from other players so they don’t lower your FPS or block your view during a fight._

- Dynamic Armor: _Your target’s armor gradually becomes transparent based on how much damage they’ve taken. This lets you know how “broken” the other player._

- Range Rendering: _Visible hitbox, a reach ring, and the crosshair turns red when the enemy is within range. Everything is customizable with Hex colors from the menu._

- Connection Alerts: _Notifies you in chat if the server is lagging, if you’re landing phantom hits, or if there’s desync with the other player._

- Sound: _If you miss the impact sounds from version 1.8, you can enable them here. You can also mute the impact sounds of other players who are fighting or dampen them to make them sound more equalized._

- PotFix (Legit): _Forget about pots getting stuck when you switch slots. You can choose between 50ms, 100ms, 150ms, or the normal Minecraft delay. It has a system to prevent you from spamming like a machine gun if you have 64 stacks (avoids bans for FastUse)._
 
## ════════════════════════ **Execution** ════════════════════════
Type /hra in the chat to open the menu. It’s a neon purple panel where you can toggle everything on and off instantly.
Or by pressing the “H” key
## ══════════════════════════ **HUD** ══════════════════════════
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bdb176ac4870d457829d0458b428a3d0eb6205e.png)
## ═════════════════════════ **Reason** ═════════════════════════
_This project is based on BetterHitReg. However, my main goal with HitRangeActivity was to rebuild it to make it as legitimate as possible, removing questionable features and adding a much deeper level. I created this mod myself to ensure a PvP experience perfectly tailored to my needs._
_
## ═══════════════════════════ **Note** ═════════════════════════
_The mod is under constant development whenever a bug is found, so I appreciate any bug reports to keep improving the experience. 

Using this mod may be considered a violation on certain servers. We recommend that you review each server's rules before enabling it, as some custom features could be interpreted as an unfair advantage.
